Class GameController

java.lang.Object
com.splendor.web.controller.GameController
@Controller public class GameController extends Object
Spring MVC controller for in-progress gameplay: rendering the board, handling human actions via form posts, and delegating turn completion and CPU turns to GameService.

Game state is read from the HTTP session attribute "gameSession" (GameSession).

  • Constructor Details

    • GameController

      public GameController(GameService gameService)
      Parameters:
      gameService - facade for token, card, turn, and CPU logic

  • Method Details

    • game

      @GetMapping("/game") public String game(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpSession session, org.springframework.ui.Model model, org.springframework.web.servlet.mvc.support.RedirectAttributes ra)
      Main game entry: loads session state and returns the appropriate view.

      If there is no session game, redirects home. If the game has ended, shows game-over. If the current player is human, shows game (optionally with tour). Otherwise runs one CPU turn and shows cpu-turn with a play-by-play log.

      Parameters:
      session - HTTP session containing "gameSession"; may contain "showTour"
      model - receives gameSession, and view-specific attributes (winners, CPU log, etc.)
      ra - used when redirecting home with flash error if no game exists
      Returns:
      view name game, game-over, or cpu-turn, or redirect:/

    • take3

      @PostMapping("/game/take3") public String take3(@RequestParam String color1, @RequestParam String color2, @RequestParam String color3, jakarta.servlet.http.HttpSession session, org.springframework.web.servlet.mvc.support.RedirectAttributes ra)
      Handles "take three different coloured tokens" when it is the current human player's turn.
      Parameters:
      color1 - first gem colour (case-insensitive)
      color2 - second gem colour, distinct from the others per rules
      color3 - third gem colour
      session - HTTP session holding "gameSession"
      ra - flash attributes for errors or success / return-token flow
      Returns:
      redirect to / if no session game, /game otherwise

    • take2

      @PostMapping("/game/take2") public String take2(@RequestParam String color, jakarta.servlet.http.HttpSession session, org.springframework.web.servlet.mvc.support.RedirectAttributes ra)
      Handles "take two tokens of the same colour" when the bank has at least four of that colour.
      Parameters:
      color - gem colour (case-insensitive)
      session - HTTP session holding "gameSession"
      ra - flash attributes for errors or success / return-token flow
      Returns:
      redirect to / if no session game, /game otherwise

    • reserveTable

      @PostMapping("/game/reserve-table") public String reserveTable(@RequestParam int level, @RequestParam int index, jakarta.servlet.http.HttpSession session, org.springframework.web.servlet.mvc.support.RedirectAttributes ra)
      Reserves a face-up development card from the table for the current player (gold taken if available).
      Parameters:
      level - card level (1, 2, or 3)
      index - index within the open row for that level
      session - HTTP session holding "gameSession"
      ra - flash attributes for errors or success / return-token flow
      Returns:
      redirect to / or /game

    • reserveDeck

      @PostMapping("/game/reserve-deck") public String reserveDeck(@RequestParam int level, jakarta.servlet.http.HttpSession session, org.springframework.web.servlet.mvc.support.RedirectAttributes ra)
      Reserves the top card from the closed deck of the given level without revealing it to others in the UI beyond the reserve action.
      Parameters:
      level - deck level (1, 2, or 3)
      session - HTTP session holding "gameSession"
      ra - flash attributes for errors or success / return-token flow
      Returns:
      redirect to / or /game

    • buyTable

      @PostMapping("/game/buy-table") public String buyTable(@RequestParam int level, @RequestParam int index, jakarta.servlet.http.HttpSession session, org.springframework.web.servlet.mvc.support.RedirectAttributes ra)
      Purchases a face-up development card from the table using the current player's tokens (and gold as wild).
      Parameters:
      level - card level (1, 2, or 3)
      index - index within the open row for that level
      session - HTTP session holding "gameSession"
      ra - flash attributes for errors or success / return-token flow
      Returns:
      redirect to / or /game

    • buyReserved

      @PostMapping("/game/buy-reserved") public String buyReserved(@RequestParam int index, jakarta.servlet.http.HttpSession session, org.springframework.web.servlet.mvc.support.RedirectAttributes ra)
      Purchases a card from the current player's reserved hand by slot index.
      Parameters:
      index - index of the reserved card to buy
      session - HTTP session holding "gameSession"
      ra - flash attributes for errors or success / return-token flow
      Returns:
      redirect to / or /game

    • returnTokens

      @PostMapping("/game/return-tokens") public String returnTokens(@RequestParam(required=false) List<String> tokens, jakarta.servlet.http.HttpSession session, org.springframework.web.servlet.mvc.support.RedirectAttributes ra)
      Returns excess tokens to the bank when the current player is over the per-player token limit. Completes the turn once the player is back at or under the limit.
      Parameters:
      tokens - colours to return; must include at least as many entries as the current excess
      session - HTTP session holding "gameSession"
      ra - flash error if too few tokens selected, or success when turn ends
      Returns:
      redirect to / or /game
